app_description: Manage your money exchange and transfer operations with local SQLite storage.
name: Name
no_accounts: No accounts yet. Add your first account from the form.
error_bridge: Electron bridge is not available. Run this in desktop mode.
error_required: Both account code and account name are required.
overview_description: Manage your money exchange and transfer operations from the desktop app.
settings_description: Manage your database location, language, organizations, clients, and currencies from one place.
settings_database_description: Choose where Arkam stores the SQLite database used by the desktop app.
settings_database_hint: If the selected folder does not already contain a database file, the current database will be copied there.
settings_language_description: Choose the language used across the application interface.
organizations_description: Create and maintain the organizations you manage inside the app.
organization_page_description: View all clients assigned to this organization.
organization_page_no_organization: Open an organization to see its clients.
organization_page_no_clients: No clients are assigned to this organization yet.
no_organizations: No organizations yet. Add your first organization from the form.
organization_delete_confirm: Delete this organization? Related clients will remain but become unassigned.
clients_description: Track your clients and assign each one a currency account.
client_currency_required: Please select a currency to open an account for this client.
no_clients: No clients yet. Add your first client from the form.
currencies_description: Define the currencies used in exchange operations. Mark one as the main currency.
currency_required: Currency code and name are required.
currency_delete_confirm: Delete this currency? Clients linked to it will lose their currency assignment.
no_currencies: No currencies yet. Add your first currency from the form.
transactions_description: Record exchange and transfer operations between currencies.
no_transactions: No transactions yet. Create your first transaction from the form.
client_page_description: Track balances and every transaction for this client, separated by account currency.
client_page_no_client: Open a client page from the Clients tab to see balances and ledger history.
client_page_no_transactions: No transactions for this account yet.
client_account_delete_confirm: Close this account? Existing transactions referencing it will also be deleted.
no_client_accounts: No accounts yet. Open the first account below.
transaction_required: Both accounts, amount, and currency are required.
transaction_client_no_currency: One or both selected clients have no currency assigned.
